note.item: First Joomla 5/6 build of CWM Connect (formerly Church Directory for Joomla 3). Pre-release while ARS publish wiring and live-install verification are completed; not yet recommended for production.

addition.item: Joomla 5/6 + PHP 8.4 baseline: namespaced PSR-4 layout (CWM\Component\Churchdirectory\{Administrator,Site}), MVCFactory/ComponentDispatcherFactory provider, namespaced controllers/models/tables/views, typed properties and strict_types throughout admin/, site/, modules/, and plugins/.
Bundled site module mod_birthdayanniversary rewritten on the J5 Dispatcher + HelperFactory pattern.
Smart Search finder plugin rewritten as an event subscriber against Joomla\CMS\Event\Finder typed events.
Frontend assets registered through media/com_churchdirectory/joomla.asset.json (WebAssetManager); LESS pipeline retired.
Database schema migrated to utf8mb4 / utf8mb4_unicode_ci, with alias columns preserving utf8mb4_bin for case-sensitive slug uniqueness.
PHPUnit 12 test scaffolding with PSR-4 stubs for Joomla CMS classes; CI matrix on PHP 8.4.

Adopted cwm/build-tools release pipeline (composer release / bump / package / ars-publish / changelog); per-extension cwm-build.config.json describes the package layout, ARS endpoint, and changelog URL.

change.item: Component renamed from Church Directory to CWM Connect at the package level; component element remains com_churchdirectory for upgrade continuity.
Phing build removed in favour of cwm-build-tools + build/build-package.php.

remove.item: Legacy Joomla 3 entry points (admin/churchdirectory.php, site/churchdirectory.php), JControllerLegacy / JFactory / JText / JTable call sites, JHtml service registrations, and the LESS source tree.
